user.title: Connect to LazyVolt Cloud
user.description: Enter your LazyVolt Cloud credentials. The edge name is how this Home Assistant instance will appear in the Cloud dashboard.

peblar.title: Select Peblar charger
peblar.description: Select which Peblar charger LazyVolt should control.

abort.no_peblar: No Peblar integration found. Please set up the Peblar integration first.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to LazyVolt Cloud. Check the URL and try again.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the logs for details.
